{{Infobox madra
| name = Blackflame aura
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Little Blue]] can scrub [[Yerin's spirit]] clean of the [[Blackflame aura]] buildup.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] needs to generate [[Blackflame aura]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The air in the cave is suffused with [[Blackflame aura]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
